---
title: Quotes
page-layout: full
---

My go-to quotes.

> I know that I know nothing. - *Socrates*

> I fear not the man who has practiced 10,000 kicks once, but I fear the man who has practiced one kick 10,000 times. - *Bruce Lee*

> People are people. - *Jake Morin (My Boss at Nextracker). I'll add to this even "I'm one".*

> Discipline is a luxury. - *Dr. Renta Chintala Bhargavi (My Professor)*
